ChangeRequest.name: `Other party identifier`.`Other party code` should be mandatory
ChangeRequest.comment:
<!-- See: documentation on [Issues in GitLab](https://gitlab.sofa.dev/sdd-bird-team/bird-logical-data-model/-/wikis/Issues-in-GitLab) -->
### Overview
The `Other party identifier` entity type has only one non-key attribute, i.e., `Other party code`, which is optional. Hence, the model allows to create an instance of the entity type `Other party identifier` that does not provide any (valuable) information - except for that for a particular `Party` there exists an `Other party code` (entity type) but without known `Other party code` (attibute).
### Contact person
dominik.lin-ully@oenb.at
### Description of change request
Make the attribute `Other party identifier`.`Other party code` mandatory.
### Summary of impacted LDM objects/attributes
* `Other party identifier`.`Other party code`
![image](/uploads/eb97088d46c43dfa9a8e661a79db9ee5/image.png)
### Forward Engineering considerations _[Other considerations]_
